name: Sweet Finger Wontons
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, egg, and salt in a bowl. Gradually add water to form a stiff dough. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and knead well for 10 minutes.
2. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes while preparing the fillings.
3. Mix the fillings as desired.
4. Roll the dough out paper thin or pass through a pasta machine until it is very thin.
5. Cut into 3-inch squares.
6. Place about 1 tablespoon of filling in the center of each square.
7. Roll up tightly and twist the ends to form wonton wrappers.
8. Deep fry the wontons, a few at a time, in oil heated to 375°F (190°C) for 5 minutes until golden brown.
9. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
